originalTitle: Madagascar military leader sacks cabinet in surprise move
title: Madagascar military leader sacks cabinet in surprise move
content: Col Randrianirina, who seized power last year, did not give a reason for dissolving his government.

originalTitle: Ghana calls on Commonwealth to condemn attack on its peacekeepers in Lebanon
title: Ghana calls on Commonwealth to condemn attack on its peacekeepers in Lebanon
content: Four soldiers were injured but all are now in a stable condition, Ghana's army says.

originalTitle: Guinea opposition leader urges 'direct resistance' after 40 parties dissolved
title: Guinea opposition leader urges 'direct resistance' after 40 parties dissolved
content: Cellou Dalein Diallo accuses the junta-leader-turned-president of erasing political threats.

originalTitle: US civil rights group documents ‘broad attack on Muslim life’ in 2025
title: US civil rights group documents ‘broad attack on Muslim life’ in 2025
content: CAIR releases annual report, warning discrimination is likely to continue as Iran war sparks a new wave of hate speech.

originalTitle: Around 140 US service members wounded in Iran war, Pentagon says
title: Around 140 US service members wounded in Iran war, Pentagon says
content: US Department of Defense says eight service members in critical condition as White House hails progress of assault.

originalTitle: Unexploded missile extracted from house in western Iran
title: Unexploded missile extracted from house in western Iran
content: Rescue workers carefully extracted an unexploded missile from a house in Kuhdasht City, following US-Israeli airstrikes.

originalTitle: 'I just want to be able to sleep': Attacks in Iran rock cities and cut power
title: 'I just want to be able to sleep': Attacks in Iran rock cities and cut power
content: Iranians in Tehran and Karaj tell the BBC they are exhausted and struggling to sleep after 10 days of Israeli and US attacks.

originalTitle: Steve Rosenberg: Russia seeks diplomatic and economic gains from Iran war
title: Steve Rosenberg: Russia seeks diplomatic and economic gains from Iran war
content: President Putin pits himself as a potential mediator but that's not an easy sell, writes the BBC's Russia editor.

originalTitle: At least six dead in Switzerland bus fire
title: At least six dead in Switzerland bus fire
content: Police do not yet know the cause of the fire in the western Fribourg canton, which also injured a number of people.

originalTitle: Spurs replace keeper Kinsky in 17th minute after horror start
title: Spurs replace keeper Kinsky in 17th minute after horror start
content: Tottenham replace goalkeeper Antonin Kinsky in the 17th minute after conceding three goals inside the opening quarter of an hour of the Champions League last-16 tie at Atletico Madrid.

originalTitle: England's Walker retires from international football
title: England's Walker retires from international football
content: Experienced England defender Kyle Walker retires from international football with immediate effect.

originalTitle: 'Things will be more normal' in Champions League home game - Slot
title: 'Things will be more normal' in Champions League home game - Slot
content: Liverpool manager Arne Slot calls for improvement from both his players and the officials, after the Reds 1-0 first leg defeat to Galatasary in Istanbul.
